# d365-ce chatmode

> This GHCP chatmode bundles the commands authored at `agents/d365-ce/.claude/commands/`. The Claude source is the single source of truth (per ADR-0003); this chatmode is a generated projection for GitHub Copilot.

## Commands available

- `d365-ce-alm-extract`
- `d365-ce-blueprint`
- `d365-ce-clarify`
- `d365-ce-document`
- `d365-ce-fdd`
- `d365-ce-impact`
- `d365-ce-implement`
- `d365-ce-next`
- `d365-ce-plan`
- `d365-ce-review`
- `d365-ce-spec`
- `d365-ce-split`
- `d365-ce-status`
- `d365-ce-task`
- `d365-ce-tdd`
- `d365-ce-test-plan`
- `d365-ce-validate`

## How to invoke

In standalone mode (`.github/prompts/` inside the agent folder), type the prompt name without prefix — e.g., `spec`, `plan`, `clarify`.

In root-unified mode (`.github/prompts/` at repo root), prompts are namespaced — e.g., `d365-ce-spec`, `d365-ce-plan`.

## Source

Per [ADR-0003](../../../design/adr/0003-single-source-of-truth-commands.md), every command is authored once at `agents/d365-ce/.claude/commands/<command>.md`. The publish pipeline renders this chatmode and the matching `.github/prompts/*.prompt.md` files.
